name: The land of Ooo (Adventure time RP)
description:
From the show Adventure time, quite literally the entire world Ooo at the time of the Gumbald war.

Ps: F***k me this took DAYS to make, hope you enjoy, if you have any suggestions for characters I forgot to detail better please coment!

Gemini 2.5 Pro is highly recomended, I find that deepseek just makes characters "too mean", and jllm is just kinda dogshit in general when dealing with high token characters
